site.name: Oak & Pixel
site.description: Oak & Pixel is a premium digital studio in Randburg building high-end websites, lead generation systems, automation strategy, and digital infrastructure for ambitious brands.

pages.title: Oak & Pixel - Digital Infrastructure, Designed with Distinction

services.name: Signature Plan
services.summary: A professional digital foundation with a website, booking system, appointment reminders, basic invoicing, and essential digital presence.

services.name: Growth Plan
services.summary: An operations and lead-management plan with online payments, CRM, KPI dashboards, automated communications, and LeadSense Core.

services.name: Private Plan
services.summary: A fully integrated growth ecosystem with Atlas AI, WhatsApp automation, client portal, advanced reporting, API integrations, process automation, and monthly optimisation consulting.

services.name: Digital Advisory Session
services.summary: A focused advisory engagement for strategy, technical direction, and prioritisation.
